1: //! ox_workflow_abi cdylib wrapper for ox_cc_broker_plugin.
2: //!
3: //! Plugin config: path to the YAML config file (passed as plugin_config_ctx string).
4: //!
5: //! Routes (matched on request.method + request.path segments):
6: //!   GET    /broker/healthz
7: //!   POST   /broker/request
8: //!   GET    /broker/pending
9: //!   GET    /broker/pending/{id}
10: //!   POST   /broker/pending/{id}/approve
11: //!   POST   /broker/pending/{id}/reject
12: //!   GET    /broker/approved
13: //!   GET    /broker/approved/{template_id}
14: //!   POST   /broker/approved/{template_id}/ack
15: //!   POST   /broker/enroll
16: //!   GET    /broker/clients
17: //!   POST   /broker/sessions
18: //!   GET    /broker/sessions/pending
19: //!   GET    /broker/sessions/pending/{id}
20: //!   POST   /broker/sessions/{id}/approve
21: //!   POST   /broker/sessions/{id}/reject
22: //!   DELETE /broker/sessions/{id}
23: //!   GET    /broker/audit
24: 
25: #![cfg_attr(test, allow(unused_imports, dead_code))]
26: 
27: use std::ffi::{c_void, CStr, CString};
28: #[cfg(not(test))]
29: use std::ffi::c_char;
30: #[cfg(not(test))]
31: use std::panic;
32: 
33: use ox_workflow_abi::{
34:     CoreHostApi, FlowControl, FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE, OX_LOG_ERROR, OX_LOG_INFO,
35: };
36: #[cfg(not(test))]
37: use ox_workflow_abi::OX_WORKFLOW_ABI_VERSION;
38: 
39: use crate::config::BrokerPluginConfig;
40: use crate::db::BrokerDb;
41: use crate::handlers;
42: 
43: /// Persistent plugin state (no DB connection — opened per request for thread safety).
44: #[cfg(not(test))]
45: struct PluginState {
46:     api: CoreHostApi,
47:     config: BrokerPluginConfig,
48: }
49: 
50: // All fields are Send+Sync; DB opened per-request, so no !Send types held.
51: #[cfg(not(test))]
52: unsafe impl Send for PluginState {}
53: #[cfg(not(test))]
54: unsafe impl Sync for PluginState {}
55: 
56: // ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
57: 
58: #[cfg(not(test))]
59: fn get_field(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: &str) -> String {
60:     let Ok(c_key) = CString::new(key) else { return String::new() };
61:     let ptr = (api.get_field)(task_ctx, c_key.as_ptr());
62:     if ptr.is_null() {
63:         return String::new();
64:     }
65:     unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(ptr).to_string_lossy().into_owned() }
66: }
67: 
68: #[cfg(not(test))]
69: fn set_field(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: &str, value: &str) {
70:     if let (Ok(c_key), Ok(c_val)) = (CString::new(key), CString::new(value)) {
71:         (api.set_field)(task_ctx, c_key.as_ptr(), c_val.as_ptr());
72:     }
73: }
74: 
75: #[cfg(not(test))]
76: #[allow(dead_code)]
77: fn get_field_bytes_data(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: &str) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
78:     let c_key = CString::new(key).unwrap();
79:     let mut len: usize = 0;
80:     let ptr = (api.get_field_bytes)(task_ctx, c_key.as_ptr(), &mut len as *mut usize);
81:     if ptr.is_null() || len == 0 { return None; }
82:     Some(unsafe { std::slice::from_raw_parts(ptr, len) }.to_vec())
83: }
84: 
85: #[cfg(not(test))]
86: #[allow(dead_code)]
87: fn set_field_bytes_data(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: &str, data: &[u8]) {
88:     let c_key = CString::new(key).unwrap();
89:     (api.set_field_bytes)(task_ctx, c_key.as_ptr(), data.as_ptr(), data.len());
90: }
91: 
92: #[cfg(not(test))]
93: fn log(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, level: u8, msg: &str) {
94:     if let Ok(c_msg) = CString::new(msg) {
95:         (api.log)(task_ctx, level, c_msg.as_ptr());
96:     }
97: }
98: 
99: #[cfg(not(test))]
100: fn respond(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, status: u16, body: &str) {
101:     set_field(api, task_ctx, "response.status", &status.to_string());
102:     set_field(api, task_ctx, "response.body", body);
103:     set_field(api, task_ctx, "response.header.Content-Type", "application/json");
104: }
105: 
106: // ── ABI entry points ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
107: 
108: #[cfg(not(test))]
109: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
110: pub extern "C" fn ox_plugin_init(
111:     config_ptr: *const c_char,
112:     api_ptr: *const CoreHostApi,
113:     abi_version: u32,
114: ) -> *mut c_void {
115:     if abi_version != OX_WORKFLOW_ABI_VERSION || api_ptr.is_null() {
116:         return std::ptr::null_mut();
117:     }
118:     let api = unsafe { *api_ptr };
119: 
120:     let config_path = if config_ptr.is_null() {
121:         log(&api, std::ptr::null_mut(), OX_LOG_ERROR, "ox_cc_broker_plugin: missing config");
122:         return std::ptr::null_mut();
123:     } else {
124:         let raw = unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(config_ptr).to_string_lossy() };
125:         // Try to parse as JSON module config and extract config_file
126:         if let Ok(v) = serde_json::from_str::<serde_json::Value>(&raw) {
127:             if let Some(path) = v.get("config_file").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {
128:                 path.to_string()
129:             } else {
130:                 log(&api, std::ptr::null_mut(), OX_LOG_ERROR,
131:                     "ox_cc_broker_plugin: missing config_file in module config");
132:                 return std::ptr::null_mut();
133:             }
134:         } else {
135:             // Not JSON — treat the raw string as a direct file path (tests / CLI)
136:             raw.into_owned()
137:         }
138:     };
139: 
140:     let config = match BrokerPluginConfig::load(&config_path) {
141:         Ok(c) => c,
142:         Err(e) => {
143:             log(
144:                 &api,
145:                 std::ptr::null_mut(),
146:                 OX_LOG_ERROR,
147:                 &format!("ox_cc_broker_plugin: config error: {}", e),
148:             );
149:             return std::ptr::null_mut();
150:         }
151:     };
152: 
153:     log(&api, std::ptr::null_mut(), OX_LOG_INFO, "ox_cc_broker_plugin: initialized");
154:     Box::into_raw(Box::new(PluginState { api, config })) as *mut c_void
155: }
156: 
157: #[cfg(not(test))]
158: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
159: pub extern "C" fn ox_plugin_process(
160:     plugin_ctx: *mut c_void,
161:     task_ctx: *mut c_void,
162: ) -> FlowControl {
163:     let cont = FlowControl { code: FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE, payload: std::ptr::null() };
164:     if plugin_ctx.is_null() {
165:         return cont;
166:     }
167:     let state = unsafe { &*(plugin_ctx as *mut PluginState) };
168: 
169:     let result = panic::catch_unwind(panic::AssertUnwindSafe(|| dispatch(state, task_ctx)));
170:     match result {
171:         Ok(fc) => fc,
172:         Err(_) => {
173:             log(&state.api, task_ctx, OX_LOG_ERROR, "ox_cc_broker_plugin: panic in handler");
174:             respond(&state.api, task_ctx, 500, r#"{"error":"internal error"}"#);
175:             cont
176:         }
177:     }
178: }
179: 
180: #[cfg(not(test))]
181: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
182: pub extern "C" fn ox_plugin_error(_plugin_ctx: *mut c_void, _task_ctx: *mut c_void) {}
183: 
184: #[cfg(not(test))]
185: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
186: pub extern "C" fn ox_plugin_destroy(plugin_ctx: *mut c_void) {
187:     if !plugin_ctx.is_null() {
188:         unsafe {
189:             drop(Box::from_raw(plugin_ctx as *mut PluginState));
190:         }
191:     }
192: }
193: 
194: // ── dispatcher ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
195: 
196: #[cfg(not(test))]
197: fn dispatch(state: &PluginState, task_ctx: *mut c_void) -> FlowControl {
198:     let api = &state.api;
199:     let cont = FlowControl { code: FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE, payload: std::ptr::null() };
200: 
201:     let method = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.method").to_uppercase();
202:     let path = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.path");
203:     let body = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.body");
204: 
205:     let db = match BrokerDb::open(&state.config.db_path, &state.config.db_encryption_key) {
206:         Ok(d) => d,
207:         Err(e) => {
208:             log(api, task_ctx, OX_LOG_ERROR, &format!("ox_cc_broker_plugin: db error: {}", e));
209:             respond(api, task_ctx, 503, r#"{"error":"service unavailable"}"#);
210:             return cont;
211:         }
212:     };
213: 
214:     let segs: Vec<&str> = path.trim_start_matches('/').split('/').collect();
215: 
216:     let response = match (method.as_str(), segs.as_slice()) {
217:         ("GET", ["broker", "healthz"]) => handlers::healthz(),
218:         ("POST", ["broker", "request"]) => handlers::submit_template(&db, &state.config, &body),
219:         ("GET", ["broker", "pending"]) => handlers::list_pending(&db),
220:         ("GET", ["broker", "pending", id]) => handlers::get_pending(&db, id),
221:         ("POST", ["broker", "pending", id, "approve"]) => {
222:             handlers::approve_template(&db, &state.config, id, &body)
223:         }
224:         ("POST", ["broker", "pending", id, "reject"]) => {
225:             handlers::reject_template(&db, id, &body)
226:         }
227:         ("GET", ["broker", "approved"]) => handlers::list_approved(&db),
228:         ("GET", ["broker", "approved", template_id]) => handlers::get_approved(&db, template_id),
229:         ("POST", ["broker", "approved", template_id, "ack"]) => {
230:             handlers::acknowledge_approved(&db, template_id)
231:         }
232:         ("POST", ["broker", "enroll"]) => handlers::register_client(&db, &body),
233:         ("GET", ["broker", "clients"]) => handlers::list_clients(&db),
234:         ("POST", ["broker", "sessions"]) => handlers::submit_session(&db, &body),
235:         ("GET", ["broker", "sessions", "pending"]) => handlers::list_pending_sessions(&db),
236:         ("GET", ["broker", "sessions", "pending", id]) => {
237:             handlers::get_pending_session(&db, id)
238:         }
239:         ("POST", ["broker", "sessions", id, "approve"]) => {
240:             handlers::approve_session(&db, id, &body)
241:         }
242:         ("POST", ["broker", "sessions", id, "reject"]) => {
243:             handlers::reject_session(&db, id, &body)
244:         }
245:         ("DELETE", ["broker", "sessions", id]) => handlers::close_session(&db, id),
246:         ("GET", ["broker", "audit"]) => handlers::query_audit(&db),
247:         _ => {
248:             log(api, task_ctx, OX_LOG_INFO,
249:                 &format!("ox_cc_broker_plugin: no route for {} {}", method, path));
250:             return cont;
251:         }
252:     };
253: 
254:     respond(api, task_ctx, response.status, &response.body);
255:     cont
256: }
